languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

languages.text: "Эти цвета поразительно напоминают переливы, которые я встречала у некоторых хищников. Только ярче и страннее. Они будто... заманивают нас ближе".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."
languages.original_text: "Эти цвета поразительно напоминают переливы, которые я встречала у некоторых хищников. Только ярче и страннее. Они будто... заманивают нас ближе".

traits.locale_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."
"These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."
"These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

languages.text: 「この色合いは、私がかつて遭遇したある種の捕食者の、きらめく色合いと驚くほど似ています。ただ、より鮮やかで、より異色です。まるで...私たちを近づけようとしているかのようです」
languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

traits.locale_text: 「この色合いは、私がかつて遭遇したある種の捕食者の、きらめく色合いと驚くほど似ています。ただ、より鮮やかで、より異色です。まるで...私たちを近づけようとしているかのようです。」

languages.text: « Ces couleurs sont remarquablement similaires aux teintes miroitantes que j'ai déjà vues chez certains prédateurs, mais plus vives, plus inhabituelles. C'est comme si elles... nous appelaient. »
languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

traits.locale_text: « Ces couleurs sont remarquablement similaires aux teintes miroitantes que j'ai déjà vues chez certains prédateurs, mais plus vives, plus inhabituelles. C'est comme si elles... nous appelaient. »

languages.text: "Diese Farben haben eine erstaunliche Ähnlichkeit mit der schimmernden Färbung bestimmter Raubtiere. Allerdings sind sie lebendiger, ungewöhnlicher. Es ist, als würden sie uns ... anlocken."
languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Farben haben eine erstaunliche Ähnlichkeit mit der schimmernden Färbung bestimmter Raubtiere. Allerdings sind sie lebendiger, ungewöhnlicher. Es ist, als würden sie uns ... anlocken."

languages.text: "Bu renkler, bazı yırtıcılarda karşılaştığım parıltılı tonlara çarpıcı bir şekilde benziyor. Sadece daha canlı, daha sıra dışı. Sanki bizi... Daha yakına çağırıyorlar."
languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

traits.locale_text: "Bu renkler, bazı yırtıcılarda karşılaştığım parıltılı tonlara çarpıcı bir şekilde benziyor. Sadece daha canlı, daha sıra dışı. Sanki bizi... Daha yakına çağırıyorlar."

languages.text: «Estos colores son notablemente parecidos a los relucientes tonos que he visto en ciertos depredadores, solo que más vivos, más inusuales. Es como si... nos estuviesen llamando».
languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

traits.locale_text: «Estos colores son notablemente parecidos a los relucientes tonos que he visto en ciertos depredadores, solo que más vivos, más inusuales. Es como si... nos estuviesen llamando».

languages.text: “这些色彩，与我在某些掠食者身上见过的流光极为相似，只不过更加鲜艳诡奇，仿佛……在诱使我们靠近。”
languages.original_text: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."

traits.locale_text: “这些色彩，与我在某些掠食者身上见过的流光极为相似，只不过更加鲜艳诡奇，仿佛……在诱使我们靠近。”
